name: Strawberries in Champagne
recipeIngredient: 1 quart small strawberries, washed and hulled
Chilled champagne, sparkling white wine or non-alcoholic sparkling wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the lime juice and honey until the honey melts.
2. Add two large sprigs of mint to the mixture.
3. Remove from heat and steep for 5 minutes. Discard the mint sprigs.
4. Place strawberries in a bowl, add the sauce, and toss gently.
5. Refrigerate at least 20 minutes before serving.
6. Divide the berries among six dessert dishes.
7. Pour champagne over the berries and garnish with fresh mint leaves.
